params.name: amount
params.description: Raw input token amount in atomic units (lamports for SOL).

params.name: slippageBps
params.description: Acceptable slippage in basis points (100 bps = 1%).

params.name: swapMode
params.description: Whether the amount represents the exact input or exact output.

params.name: restrictIntermediateTokens
params.description: When true, restricts intermediate tokens to a curated stable set for more reliable routes.

params.name: onlyDirectRoutes
params.description: Restricts routing to single-market direct swaps only.

params.name: asLegacyTransaction
params.description: Returns a legacy (non-versioned) transaction when used with /swap.

params.name: maxAccounts
params.description: Upper bound on the accounts used in the swap transaction.

items.docs: Returns the best routing plan and pricing for swapping an input token into an output token across Solana DEXes. The response is passed directly to /swap to build a swap transaction.
Converts a quote response and a user public key into a serialized Solana transaction ready to be signed and submitted.
